system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Meditation against Attack roll or TN 6
Type: Normal, Counter
Qi: 1

When someone attacks you openhanded, you clutch their wrist and dig in with icy claws that chill the blood. On a Success you grow luminous claws that are as sharp as ice. You do normal Damage +1d10 per Rank of Neigong with the Arm Strike and drain 1 point of Hardiness. This special Technique requires payment to the ghosts in blood. If you do not kill the target of this attack within the hour, you take 2 Wounds and suffer wracking pain. Cathartic: In addition to the normal effect, on a success this drains one point of Hardiness per Rank of Neigong, but it also temporarily eliminates the target’s emotions. You select which emotion to eliminate. They can literally feel no Love, Hatred, Pleasure, Anger, Happiness or Sorrow for 1 hour per Rank of Qi. You may only eliminate one emotion.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetDrainsNote: Cathartic use also removes one chosen emotion for 1 hour per Rank of Qi.
system.catharticTargetEffects: Choose one emotion to eliminate from the target for 1 hour per Rank of Qi
system.consequenceNote: If the target of this attack is not killed within the hour, the user takes 2 Wounds and suffers wracking pain.
system.catharticEffect: In addition to the normal effect, on a success this drains one point of Hardiness per Rank of Neigong, but it also temporarily eliminates the target’s emotions. You select which emotion to eliminate. They can literally feel no Love, Hatred, Pleasure, Anger, Happiness or Sorrow for 1 hour per Rank of Qi. You may only eliminate one emotion.
